item.title: Water Baron Controls Last Known Well in Sector 7
item.description: He charges ten bullets per gallon. The thirsty have no choice.

item.title: Elysium Synthwave: The Last Breath of a Neon Dream
item.description: In an era where the past collides with the digital, humanity seeks solace in echoes of a forsaken culture.

item.title: Polio Vaccine Declared Safe After Nationwide Trials
item.description: Dr. Salk's miracle is here. Parents are lining up around the block.

item.title: The Glorious Triumph of the Just: Our Noble Knights Prevail in the Battle of Eldermere
item.description: In a splendid clash of valor and chivalry, the forces of righteousness have vanquished the marauding brigands that threatened our peaceful realm.

item.title: THE ELITE FALLEN: A PANDEMIC OF PRIVILEGE UNLEASHES CHAOS IN THE MEGACITY
item.description: As the wealthy succumb to their own affluence, the underclasses rise amidst the ruins of a corporate-dominated dystopia.

item.title: FIVE-YEAR PLAN EXCEEDS QUOTA BY 12%
item.description: Comrade workers have surpassed projections in steel and concrete.

item.title: Architect Unveils Plans for Mile-High Tower
item.description: Skeptics call it impossible. The architect calls it Tuesday.

item.title: Aether-Train Derailment Claims Twelve Souls
item.description: Investigators suspect sabotage by Luddite saboteurs.
